title: Arctics Undertale Souls
description: This mod was made from an idea I have had for a long time where you can be a human and or monster from Undertale. You can use Monster or Human magic to make your way through the world. You can either be enemys or friends its your choice.
body:
This mod was made from an idea I have had for a long time where you can be a human and or monster from Undertale. You can use Monster or Human magic to make your way through the world. You can either be enemys or friends its your choice.

Become a Monster or Human.

Human Souls:

Determination \
Bravery \
Justice \
Kindness \
Patience \
Integrety \
Perseverance 

Monster soul/types:

Normal Monster - No magic yet \
Fire Magic \
Water Magic \
Ice Magic \
Plant Magic \
Lightning Magic

Keybinds

Soul Ability 1 = Z \
Soul Ability 2 = X

Recommendations:

Keepinventory = True \
Spawnwithsoul = True (if not you can craft them) \
Jei


If there are any bugs or problems please comment on the mod.
